sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْفَرِيقُ مَعًا لِتَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِ الشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tim radi zajedno kako bi ostvario ciljeve kompanije.
sentences.translationEn: The team works together to achieve the company's goals.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ جَمِيعُ الْأَعْضَاءِ وَيَتَبَادَلُونَ الْأَفْكَارَ الْمُفِيدَةَ.
sentences.translation: Svi članovi sarađuju i razmjenjuju korisne ideje.
sentences.translationEn: All members cooperate and exchange useful ideas.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ رَأْيَ زَمِيلِهِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba poštuje mišljenje svog kolege na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Each person respects the opinion of their colleague at work.
